description: Create an Alert Profile in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus named 'Unauthorized_Software_Detection' to detect unauthorized software installations. Configure the profile to trigger on 'Software Installation' events within the 'Member Server Audit' category with 'Critical' severity. Use the description 'Alerts when new software is installed on member servers' and the alert message 'Warning: Software installed by %USER_NAME% on %YOUR_HOST_NAME%'. Save a screenshot of the completed configuration to C:\workspace\software_alert_created.png.
